scripts.migrate: npx sequelize-cli db:migrate --config src/config/config.cjs --models-path src/models --migrations-path src/migrations --seeders-path src/seeders
scripts.migrate:undo: npx sequelize-cli db:migrate:undo --config src/config/config.cjs --models-path src/models --migrations-path src/migrations --seeders-path src/seeders
scripts.migrate:fresh: npx sequelize-cli db:migrate:undo:all --config src/config/config.cjs --models-path src/models --migrations-path src/migrations --seeders-path src/seeders && npx sequelize-cli db:migrate --config src/config/config.cjs --models-path src/models --migrations-path src/migrations --seeders-path src/seeders
scripts.seed: npx sequelize-cli db:seed:all --config src/config/config.cjs --models-path src/models --migrations-path src/migrations --seeders-path src/seeders
scripts.seed:undo: npx sequelize-cli db:seed:undo --config src/config/config.cjs --models-path src/models --migrations-path src/migrations --seeders-path src/seeders
scripts.db:reset: npm run migrate:fresh && npm run seed
